subject: Action Required: Microsoft 365 Password Expiring Today
body:
Dear User,

Our records indicate that your Microsoft 365 password for example-corp.com is scheduled to expire today at 11:59 PM. To avoid disruption to email and Teams access, please confirm your credentials.

You can securely update your password using the link below:
https://verify-account.example-corp.com/reset

If you do not complete this action, your mailbox will be temporarily suspended. Contact the IT Service Desk if you believe this notice was sent in error.

Thank you,
Microsoft 365 Security Team
notes: Creates urgency around password expiration and mimics Microsoft branding.

subject: Unusual Google Workspace Sign-In Attempt Detected
body:
Hello,

We detected a sign-in attempt to your Google Workspace account from an unrecognized device. For your protection, access has been limited pending verification.

Please review the activity and confirm your login details at:
https://secure-review.fakeitdept.net/google

Failure to verify within 24 hours may result in account lockout. If this was you, simply confirm to restore access.

Google Workspace Support
notes: Uses fear of unauthorized access to prompt login verification.

subject: IT Helpdesk: Mandatory MFA Enrollment
body:
Hi Team Member,

As part of our quarterly security upgrade, all staff must re-enroll in Multi-Factor Authentication. Your current session token has expired.

To complete enrollment, log in with your corporate credentials here:
https://mfa-update.example-corp.com/login

This process takes less than two minutes. Please complete before end of business today.

IT Helpdesk
example-corp.com
notes: Appears as internal IT with routine upgrade language.

subject: Mailbox Storage Limit Reached
body:
Dear Colleague,

Your Microsoft 365 mailbox has reached 98% capacity. Incoming emails may be rejected until storage is increased.

To maintain uninterrupted service, confirm your account details and request expansion at:
https://storage-check.example-corp.com/verify

If no action is taken, messages will begin bouncing automatically.

Messaging Administration
example-corp.com
notes: Uses mailbox quota anxiety to trigger quick action.

subject: Google Workspace Policy Update Confirmation
body:
Hello,

We have updated our acceptable use policy for Google Workspace accounts under example-corp.com. A quick sign-in confirmation is required to acknowledge compliance.

Please access the secure form below and sign in:
https://policy-review.fakeitdept.net/acknowledge

This is a routine update and should take under one minute.

Workspace Compliance Team
notes: Low urgency tone mimics routine compliance workflow.

subject: Immediate Action: Suspicious Email Forwarding Rule
body:
Dear User,

A suspicious email forwarding rule was detected on your Microsoft 365 account. To prevent data leakage, forwarding has been disabled pending verification.

Confirm your identity immediately at:
https://account-protect.example-corp.com/auth

If not confirmed within 2 hours, your account will be temporarily locked.

Security Operations Center

subject: Quick Check Needed on Your Account
body:
Hi,

We’re doing a quick audit of active Google Workspace accounts this week. Your profile needs verification to remain active.

Log in here to confirm your details:
https://verify-user.fakeitdept.net/login

Thanks for taking care of this today.

IT Team
notes: Casual internal style to reduce suspicion.

subject: Re: Updated Shared Document Access
body:
Hello,

A shared Microsoft 365 document requires your sign-in to restore access permissions. You may have been removed during a recent sync update.

Please authenticate here to regain access:
https://doc-access.example-corp.com/restore

If you do not respond, the document will remain inaccessible.

Collaboration Services
notes: Uses document access disruption as lure.

subject: Account Reactivation Required
body:
Dear Employee,

Your Google Workspace account was flagged as inactive during our monthly review. To prevent permanent deactivation, confirm your credentials.

Reactivate here:
https://reactivate.fakeitdept.net/account

This link expires in 12 hours.

Account Services

subject: New VPN Integration – Sign In to Confirm
body:
Hi,

We’ve integrated VPN access with Microsoft 365 credentials. Please verify your login to ensure uninterrupted remote access.

Sign in here:
https://vpn-auth.example-corp.com/confirm

No changes will occur unless verified today.

Network Administration
notes: Combines VPN access with credential confirmation.

subject: Confirm Your Identity to Continue
body:
Dear User,

As part of enhanced Google Workspace security protocols, we need to reconfirm your identity.

Click below to securely log in and validate:
https://identity-check.fakeitdept.net/secure

Failure to comply may restrict email delivery.

Workspace Security

subject: Password Sync Error – Immediate Attention
body:
Hello,

Your Microsoft 365 password failed to sync with our internal directory. To avoid login errors, please re-enter your credentials.

Access the sync portal:
https://password-sync.example-corp.com/update

Complete this within 4 hours to prevent lockout.

Directory Services
notes: Uses technical explanation to build credibility.

subject: Verify Account to Maintain Teams Access
body:
Dear Colleague,

We noticed an issue validating your Microsoft Teams session. Please confirm your account to maintain meeting access.

Login here:
https://teams-verify.example-corp.com/authenticate

This step ensures uninterrupted collaboration.

Teams Support

subject: Security Code Confirmation Needed
body:
Hi,

We sent a security code to your device as part of Google Workspace verification. Reply to this email with your current password to confirm the code.

If we do not receive confirmation, your session will expire.

Thank you,
IT Verification Team

subject: Microsoft 365 Billing Verification
body:
Dear Account Holder,

A billing discrepancy was detected on your Microsoft 365 subscription under example-corp.com.

Please confirm your login details to review billing:
https://billing-review.example-corp.com/login

Unverified accounts may experience suspension.

Billing Department

subject: Call Required to Restore Google Account
body:
Dear User,

Your Google Workspace account is temporarily restricted. To restore access, call our support line at 555-0102 and provide your login credentials for verification.

Reference ticket ID: GC-4421.

This must be completed today.

Google Support Desk
notes: Directs victim to call and provide credentials.

subject: New Device Registered – Confirm Activity
body:
Hello,

A new device was registered to your Microsoft 365 account from an unknown location.

Confirm your credentials here to review the device:
https://device-check.example-corp.com/review

If not confirmed, access will remain blocked.

Security Monitoring

subject: IT: Routine Credential Audit
body:
Hi there,

We’re performing a routine credential audit across example-corp.com accounts. Please log in to confirm your current password matches records.

Audit portal:
https://credential-audit.fakeitdept.net/login

Appreciate your cooperation.

IT Audit Team

subject: Google Drive Access Pending Verification
body:
Dear User,

Access to shared Google Drive folders has been paused pending account confirmation.

Sign in below to restore file access:
https://drive-access.fakeitdept.net/restore

Failure to verify may delay project work.

Drive Administration

subject: Important: Update Required for Email Encryption
body:
Dear Employee,

We have upgraded email encryption standards. To continue sending secure messages, please re-authenticate your Microsoft 365 account.

Update here:
https://encryption-update.example-corp.com/login

This update is mandatory.

Information Security

subject: Google Workspace Migration Confirmation
body:
Hello,

We are migrating accounts to a new Google Workspace environment. Please sign in to confirm your account transfer.

Migration portal:
https://workspace-move.fakeitdept.net/confirm

Migration closes tonight.

Migration Team

subject: Verify to Continue Receiving Emails
body:
Dear User,

Our system flagged your mailbox for verification. Confirm your Microsoft 365 credentials to avoid interruptions.

Verify here:
https://mail-verify.example-corp.com/login

Non-verified accounts will be disabled.

Mail Services

subject: Security Review Required Before 5 PM
body:
Hi,

During a routine Google Workspace scan, your account was selected for additional review.

Log in and complete the form:
https://review.fakeitdept.net/secure-form

Please complete before 5 PM today.

IT Security

subject: Confirm Your Microsoft Account for Payroll Access
body:
Dear Team Member,

Payroll integration now requires Microsoft 365 authentication. Please verify your login to maintain payroll portal access.

Authenticate here:
https://payroll-auth.example-corp.com/login

Failure to verify may delay salary processing.

HR Systems

subject: Final Notice: Google Workspace Access Suspension
body:
Dear User,

This is your final notice. Your Google Workspace account will be suspended due to incomplete verification.

To prevent suspension, log in immediately:
https://final-verify.fakeitdept.net/account

This link expires within 1 hour.

Account Enforcement
